'''ngodhadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eucryphiaceous|eucryphiaceous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-dh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eucryphiaceous|eucryphiaceous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngodhadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngodhadhithi|ngodhadhithi]] || [[word:ngodhadhiji|ngodhadhiji]] || [[word:ngodhadhishi|ngodhadhishi]] || [[word:ngodhadhiki|ngodhadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngodhadhuthuthu|ngodhadhuthuthu]] || [[word:ngodhadhujuju|ngodhadhujuju]] || [[word:ngodhadhushushu|ngodhadhushushu]] || [[word:ngodhadhukuku|ngodhadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngodhadhuthu|ngodhadhuthu]] || [[word:ngodhadhuju|ngodhadhuju]] || [[word:ngodhadhushu|ngodhadhushu]] || [[word:ngodhadhuku|ngodhadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngodhadhufthuf|ngodhadhufthuf]] || [[word:ngodhadhufjuf|ngodhadhufjuf]] || [[word:ngodhadhufshuf|ngodhadhufshuf]] || [[word:ngodhadhufkuf|ngodhadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngodhadhethe|ngodhadhethe]] || [[word:ngodhadheje|ngodhadheje]] || [[word:ngodhadheshe|ngodhadheshe]] || [[word:ngodhadheke|ngodhadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngodhadhothotho|ngodhadhothotho]] || [[word:ngodhadhojojo|ngodhadhojojo]] || [[word:ngodhadhoshosho|ngodhadhoshosho]] || [[word:ngodhadhokoko|ngodhadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngodhadhotho|ngodhadhotho]] || [[word:ngodhadhojo|ngodhadhojo]] || [[word:ngodhadhosho|ngodhadhosho]] || [[word:ngodhadhoko|ngodhadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngodhadhofthof|ngodhadhofthof]] || [[word:ngodhadhofjof|ngodhadhofjof]] || [[word:ngodhadhofshof|ngodhadhofshof]] || [[word:ngodhadhofkof|ngodhadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf|ngodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf|ngodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf|ngodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf|ngodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngodhadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngodhadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngodhadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngodhadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf|ngodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf|ngodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf|ngodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf|ngodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf|ngodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf|ngodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf|ngodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf|ngodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŠthĂŠ|ngodhadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŠjĂŠ|ngodhadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŠshĂŠ|ngodhadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngodhadhĂŠkĂŠ|ngodhadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngodhadhathatha|ngodhadhathatha]] || [[word:ngodhadhajaja|ngodhadhajaja]] || [[word:ngodhadhashasha|ngodhadhashasha]] || [[word:ngodhadhakaka|ngodhadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngodhadhatha|ngodhadhatha]] || [[word:ngodhadhaja|ngodhadhaja]] || [[word:ngodhadhasha|ngodhadhasha]] || [[word:ngodhadhaka|ngodhadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngodhadhafthaf|ngodhadhafthaf]] || [[word:ngodhadhafjaf|ngodhadhafjaf]] || [[word:ngodhadhafshaf|ngodhadhafshaf]] || [[word:ngodhadhafkaf|ngodhadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngodhadhasha|ngodhadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngodhadhshĂ«sha|ngodhadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngodhadhrosha|ngodhadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngodhadhmusha|ngodhadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngodhadhyasha|ngodhadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongodhadhnkshĂ«sha|gongodhadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongodhadhnkrosha|gongodhadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongodhadhnkmusha|gongodhadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongodhadhnkyasha|gongodhadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngodhadhadhasha|ngodhadhadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngodhadhadhshĂ«sha|ngodhadhadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngodhadhadhrosha|ngodhadhadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngodhadhadhmusha|ngodhadhadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngodhadhadhyasha|ngodhadhadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongodhadhadhnkshĂ«sha|gongodhadhadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongodhadhadhnkrosha|gongodhadhadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongodhadhadhnkmusha|gongodhadhadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongodhadhadhnkyasha|gongodhadhadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngedhĂŠdhasha|ngedhĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngedhĂŠdhshĂ«sha|ngedhĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngedhĂŠdhrosha|ngedhĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngedhĂŠdhmusha|ngedhĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngedhĂŠdhyasha|ngedhĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongedhĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gongedhĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongedhĂŠdhnkrosha|gongedhĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongedhĂŠdhnkmusha|gongedhĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongedhĂŠdhnkyasha|gongedhĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngodhfadhasha|ngodhfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngodhfadhshĂ«sha|ngodhfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngodhfadhrosha|ngodhfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngodhfadhmusha|ngodhfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngodhfadhyasha|ngodhfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongodhfadhnkshĂ«sha|gongodhfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongodhfadhnkrosha|gongodhfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongodhfadhnkmusha|gongodhfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongodhfadhnkyasha|gongodhfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
